judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly filtering NASDAQ Capital Market symbols, the agent computed 2019 volatility counts for only a subset of tickers and then aggregated whatever partial results existed (execute_python call_qHZggy), omitting high-volatility tickers like TMSR, VERB, and SNSS, and finally mapped symbols to the "Company Description" text rather than company names, leading to an incomplete and misformatted top-5 list.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent correctly computed 2019 counts per NASDAQ Capital Market symbol but in the aggregation step (call_mn9w2pjVcRkZ55c818TuVzRR) it treated AMHC’s NaN count (from call_kXUVPZuwvNrKi10PTh3JkRHf) as a top value, causing AMHC to displace SNSS (32 days) in the top-5 before mapping to names (call_m6W6vElbBbV51Ut6If4wH4EL).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no

FM4: yes
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After listing NASDAQ Capital Market symbols from stockinfo_database and available ticker tables from stocktrade_database, the agent stopped early and returned an inability-to-complete message without performing the required 2019 per-symbol range calculations, thus failing to compute and return the requested top 5 companies.
B. Failure modes encountered:

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly identifying NASDAQ Capital Market symbols, the agent failed to generate a combined SQL (multiple execute_python SyntaxErrors) and only queried a partial subset (~41) of tickers individually before selecting the top five and deriving names from the "Company Description" field, so the ranking was computed on incomplete data and produced the wrong companies.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no

FM4: yes
